title: Podman could not find "rootlessport"
body:
### Issue Description

I installed the latest release podman 5.4.0 on ubuntu 24.04 and got following error. I tried starting a very simple compose file but got following error both  php and mysql container.
```
Error: unable to start container c3d9e27963ab7b9d7f98af42f885aa00c8dd99a175fcd22fb9735de7749d7516: preparing container c3d9e27963ab7b9d7f98af42f885aa00c8dd99a175fcd22fb9735de7749d7516 for attach: could not find "rootlessport" in one of {[/usr/local/libexec/podman /usr/local/lib/podman /usr/libexec/podman /usr/lib/podman] {<nil>}}.  To resolve this error, set the helper_binaries_dir key in the `[engine]` section of containers.conf to the directory containing your helper binaries.
```


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Download podman 5.4.0 from github
2. Create and run a compose file


### Describe the results you received

Containers won't start because of the missing rootlessport

### Describe the results you expected

Containers would start, just like when installing with apt

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

I am experimenting a lot with podman, podman-compose, podman compose and podman desktop. These might be interfering with eachother. I notice my podman client and server don't have the same version 

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: using a 5.x client and 4.x server is not something we recommend.  I'm not claiming that this is the problem necessarily, but we do ask that folks only[ report errors with the latest upstream](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/ISSUE.md#development-or-latest-version) (or near latest) versions.

> Download podman 5.4.0 from github

This is not the actual podman, we do not have linux binaries. You only downloaded the remote client and that still has to talk to a real podman server which is why it is still using your old version.

rootlessport is a binary that needs to be shipped as part of the podman package, if it is not done or in the wrong location it needs to be reported to the package maintainer not upstream.
